yea it's hard cos chatgpt translation
The 2 cost card she has adds an inspiration into your hand when you play it which is a 0 cost draw 1 gain 1 arithmetica/energy
i sort of understand the second one makes her super skill generated cards cost 1 less
The master of all things card she has copies the top card of your draw pile
E1 makes it so that whatever card it's copying the card costs 1 less

okay so
Understanding the principles of everything = Skill, Master of All Things (Pretends to be the next card in your deck)
E1: Makes it cost 1 less
Second half- Wings transcending time also allowed an additional inspiration to be drawn in your hand
Wings transcending time = Wings of Time
Inspiration = 0 card cost that gains 1 mana, draw 1 card
When you use Wings of Time, put an inspiration in your hand
makes master of all things cost -1 mana, gives a small refund to wings of time
full refund if you double cast wings of time for some reason as well

2nd one is When you use your ult, the discovered cards get preparation 1
Preparation 1 = When you hit end turn, mana costs go down by 1
of course it does, cast it twice put two inspirations

3rd is self explanatory except the second part
When resistance is triggered for the first time during exploration, add an Echo of the Past to your hand
Resistance = death resistance, so when you get killed the first time
Echo of the past = Restore your health/shields to what they were last round
Tawil's enlightens are good but not entirely necessary
I didn’t realize but her e1 is honestly pretty busted lol

540 Paid Currency For: 5940 gacha currency + 8 standard pulls + 18 menophin refills (paid currency to gacha currency ratio: 11)

Anni Gift Box: 3260 paid for 20460 gacha currency: paid currency to gacha currency ratio of 6.2

Monthly: 300 paid currency for: 6300 gacha currency (paid currency to gacha currency ratio: 21)

BP: 680 paid currency for: 4100 gacha currency + bp wheel + 6 menophin + shit ton of resources
(paid currency to gacha currency ratio: 6~)

the higher the ratio number, the more worth it is (solely calculated based on gacha currency terms for limited pulls)
basically its all the limited pulls and gacha currency provided combined into a single number, divided by the amount of premium currency required for the whole thing

You can save the genesis garden for dupe to get most value. Otherwise, use it for whomever you want. You can pair Helot with Aeigis. The other two can be whomever you want, but I do recommend Ramona and Ogier

Hameln is a support that discounts and double plays your best cards, basically hyper focusing on your main carry. Tawil can adapt to any situation when you pull cards from her exalt (with a bit of luck). However, she acts like a DPS carry for most team compositions as there are plenty better options if solely looking for a support role (since she doesn't have a designated niche when assisting your other characters).
